steps.label: index a document
steps.cmd:
curl -s -XPUT "http://localhost:9200/articles/_doc/1" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{"title":"Hello Xerj","body":"one binary for search","views":42,"tag":"intro"}'

steps.label: console SPA shell
console app bundle
first-launch setup page
steps.output:
XERJ CONSOLE

First-launch setup — claim this server by enrolling a passkey.

You're claiming the role owner on this server.

Touch your security key, biometric sensor, or platform passkey now…

If your browser didn't prompt automatically, click Try again.

✓ Passkey enrolled. Logging you in…
